goal: Build a two-tier shelf storage cell: 4 cubes from conveyor placed on a 2-level shelf — 2 cubes on top tier (z=1.0) + 2 cubes on bottom tier (z=0.85). Tests vertical workspace utilization with distinct z-levels per cube.
thoughts:
Six two-tier shelf specifics for CP-36 (extends CP-08 — drop_targets with distinct z-levels):
1) 2-level shelf: bottom tier at z=0.825, top tier at z=1.0 (~17cm separation).
2) drop_targets: Cube_1 + Cube_2 to bottom tier, Cube_3 + Cube_4 to top tier. Each tier has 2 slots side-by-side.
3) Top tier z=1.0 → robot reach: 1.0-0.75=0.25m vertical from base. Within Franka's 0.85m reach at moderate xy.
4) Tier separation 17cm > 5cm cube + 5cm clearance → cubes on bottom don't collide with EE during top placement.
5) Bottom tier slots: (-0.05, -0.4, 0.825), (+0.05, -0.4, 0.825). Top tier slots: (-0.05, -0.4, 1.000), (+0.05, -0.4, 1.000).
6) Pallet column at [0, -0.4, 0.475] (0.95m tall) provides physical structure for both tiers.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.0, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[3.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

for i, x in enumerate([-1.4, -1.15, -0.9, -0.65]):
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# 2-level shelf — 2 platforms stacked vertically
# Bottom platform at z=0.80 (top), top platform at z=0.975 (top)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/ShelfBottom", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.775], scale=[0.10, 0.05, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/ShelfBottom", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/ShelfTop",    prim_type="Cube", position=[0, -0.4, 0.95],  scale=[0.10, 0.05, 0.025])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/ShelfTop",    schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# drop_targets — 2 to bottom shelf top z=0.825, 2 to top shelf top z=1.000
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(4)],
    destination_path="/World/ShelfBottom",
    drop_targets={
        "/World/Cube_1": [-0.05, -0.4, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_2": [ 0.05, -0.4, 0.825],
        "/World/Cube_3": [-0.05, -0.4, 1.000],
        "/World/Cube_4": [ 0.05, -0.4, 1.000],
    },
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/ShelfBottom", "/World/ShelfTop"],
)
extension_notes: CP-36 demonstrates vertical workspace utilization with distinct z-tiers. drop_targets dispatches cubes to different z-heights based on cube identity. Robot must clear top shelf during transit (planning_obstacles include ShelfTop).
failure_modes: Top tier z=1.0 — robot must reach 0.25m above base. Within Franka's vertical reach.
EE_INITIAL_HEIGHT auto = max(source_z, max_drop_z) + 0.20 = 1.0 + 0.20 = 1.20m. EE clears top shelf during transit.
Cube placement on TOP shelf at z=1.0: robot descends from h1=1.20 to z=1.0. 0.20m descent — adequate.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-04-XX; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (multi-cube cube_paths + xy_tol=0.15 + rest_speed=10 — Cube_3 delivered to ShelfBottom)
